# Domain Blueprint: MCP Nervous System

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This document maps every AI-OS Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, grouped by routing domain. It is generated from `src/config/registry.json` — edit the registry, then re-run the generator. Never edit this file directly.

Total registered servers: **25**. The Architect (Gemini) curates DOMAINS; the Engineer (Claude) wires them into the registry.

## State
State and task management — TASKS.md, state.json, archives, semantic memory.

- **`task-synchronizer-mcp`** (WRITE) — Exclusive State Mutator (P-39): manages .ai/state.json, regenerates TASKS.md and REVIEWS.md as views.
- **`orchestrator-mcp`** (WRITE) — Deterministic workflow execution (P-38): replaces LLM-interpreted skills with programmatic orchestration.
- **`archive-manager-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — Auto-Pilot Archive (P-27): monitors .ai/ context health and triggers archive when thresholds are exceeded.
- **`memory`** (WRITE) — WRITE server.
- **`memory-manager-mcp`** (WRITE) — §31 Cross-Project Memory Palace: stores high-level project signatures in ~/.ai-os/memory/signatures.json.

## Code
Code intelligence and editing — filesystem, LSP, atomic patching.

- **`filesystem`** (READ) — READ server.
- **`lsp-mcp`** (READ) — §23 Code Intelligence Layer: TypeScript compiler API — symbol/type awareness for Tier 3 refactors.
- **`patch-mcp`** (WRITE) — §25 Staleness-Aware Patching: MD5-verified atomic writes — prevents race-condition overwrites.
- **`propose-patch-mcp`** (WRITE) — §30 Human-in-the-Loop Safe Diff Flow: propose_patch requires explicit confirm_patch before writing to disk.

## Safety
Pre-execution safety gates — command analysis, scope checks, risk classification, agent verification.

- **`safe-exec-mcp`** (READ) — disable-model-invocation: true — Claude cannot self-authorize execution bypass.
- **`context-guardian-mcp`** (READ) — READ server.
- **`risk-analyzer-mcp`** (READ) — TSRT classifier — invoked automatically by ai update and ai review.
- **`verification-mcp`** (READ) — §32 Verification Audit: checks agent YAML frontmatter allowed-tools against registry; flags Ghost Tools as CRITICAL.

## Intelligence
Skill/agent loading, blueprint alignment, GitHub bridge, token budgeting.

- **`context-invoker-mcp`** (READ) — Dynamic skill/agent loader — call activate_skill or activate_agent by name to inject instructions into context.
- **`blueprint-aligner-mcp`** (READ) — READ server.
- **`github-bridge-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — §28 GitHub Bridge: fetches assigned issues via gh CLI and seeds state.json for autonomous Architect cycles.
- **`token-budget-mcp`** (WRITE) — §27 Token Budget & Cost Governance: real-time LLM spend tracking persisted in ~/.ai-os/usage.sqlite.

## Quality
Test generation, visual audit, OS-level computer use.

- **`TestSprite`** (EXECUTE) — EXECUTE server.
- **`vibe-check-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — EXECUTE server.
- **`computer-use-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — E-8 Native Computer Use: sandboxed OS-level screen/keyboard/mouse for TestSprite visual QA.

## Interop
A2A bridge to Gemini and HITL approval gate.

- **`advisor-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — E-9 A2A Bridge: Claude queries Gemini Architect mid-execution via `gemini -p`.
- **`approval-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — E-10 HITL Gate: blocks Tier 3 ops until human types y/Y in terminal.

## Caching
Explicit Context Cache for blueprint-heavy prompts.

- **`cache-manager-mcp`** (READ) — E-11 Explicit Context Cache: assembles .ai/blueprints/*.md, architect.md, state.sqlite schema, and registry.json into a prompt-cacheable System Context blob.

## Compute
Sandboxed code execution — ephemeral Docker REPL for Python and Node.

- **`code-execution-mcp`** (EXECUTE) — E-39 Sandboxed Code Execution: ephemeral Docker REPL for Python (python:3.12-slim) and Node (node:22-alpine).

## Routing & Misc
Servers that orchestrate other domains (mcp-router) or are not yet categorised. Routing happens here, not inside the listed domains.

- **`mcp-router`** (EXECUTE) — E-40 MCP Router/Proxy: progressive tool discovery — list_domains/activate_domain expose only the active category's servers; proxy_call forwards JSON-RPC over stdio.
